target: 5. The Reason for Anger
Dad, add two A-lunches!
Yes!
Mio, don't carry this plate.
Yeah, thanks!
Welcome!
Hey, Shinpei!

So you're helping with the kofune today?
Even though you're back home for a visit, working?
Impressive.

If the place is this busy, help is needed.
Take the counter seat over there.
Thanks a lot.

But the shop isn't that busy,
and even you're working,
where's Ushio?
Yeah, well.

(That one—I haven't seen her face since then,
but is she still asleep…?)

So, Shinpei…
did something happen with Ushio?

Huh!?
Why would you think that…?
Actually, I ran into Ushio outside.
Outside?
I just said hello, but she glared at me!

She was in a really bad mood.
What's the reason, Shinpei?
Well, you know…

Hm?
You look like you know something.
If you don't, you should apologize soon.

If you anger a girl,
it'll be trouble.

You're right.
I'll apologize as soon as I get back.

(What is this?
A strange feeling in my chest…)
(When I get back…)
(But…what if she doesn't come back?)

(No, no…
What am I thinking?)

(Ushio not coming back…
That's impossible…)
Shinpei?
Ah, um, Ushio…where is she?

Hm?
I met her near the school.
She walked toward the beach.

(Beach…
The private beach behind the school…)

What's wrong, Shinpei?
You look really scared.

(There's no reason.
But something inside me says it's not safe…)

(Curses!
What is this feeling in my chest!?)
Hey, Shinpei!

Mio, Alan, sorry!
I have to go!

Huh?
Shin-chan?
What do you mean, "but"?
Shinpei, what's wrong?

I'm really sorry!
I'll be back soon!
Huff, huff, huff…!
(…there!)
Ushio!
Yikes!

What, Shinpei?
You scared me.
I heard you might be heading here…
Something really weird was happening in my chest.

…weird feeling?
You came all the way here just for that?

What's that?
Do you think I might drown in the sea?
Ah, yeah…

Don't worry so much!
I can swim just fine.

No, I know that!
I know how good you are at swimming.
Then why the hell are you worrying?
Still!

Still…
I just couldn't stop myself from wanting to see your face.
I ran out of the store.
Shinpei…
Same as always.
Same…
Did you feel it too?
Yeah…

After I woke up,
I went for a walk.

I felt like going to the school,
so I went to the private beach.

"I feel it's dangerous here,"
"I shouldn't get close to the beach,"
I felt that all over my body.

You idiot!
Then don't get close!

But it's annoying to just be scared.
So I decided to check it out.

When I went to Omoto Beach yesterday,
I didn't feel anything like that.

You're an idiot!
Don't make me worry for no reason.

W-what!?
I'm not that weak, you know!
No, that's…

Haha… yeah, you're right.
You're strong.
Why are you laughing!?
But…I'm really glad you're safe.
…Shinpei.

Ugh!
What's going on!?
It's been weird all day!
Yeah…

It's all because you came back.
What did you do, Shinpei?
I didn't do anything!

But…this feeling
isn't a good one.
Hey, maybe I shouldn't have come back?
That's impossible!
…Huh?

Now that you're back on the island,
it feels right,
it feels good…
I feel relieved.

All the anxiety and confusion
in my heart…

I took it out on Shinpei in a fight-like way,
and now I feel better and safe.

Huh!?
What does that mean?
"Fight-like"…you…
Actually…I wasn't really angry.
You mean you faked being angry!?
Hehe, yeah, that's what it is.

Then, when the guy from the store
came earlier and got glared at by Ushio,
what was that…?

Huh?
Oh, that time.

I felt that weird feeling at that time,
so when I saw his face,
I got angry for some reason.
You should apologize later…
What's wrong?

I'm just really tired…
I ran all the way here…
You should exercise more often.
Leave me alone.

Hey, Shinpei.
I'm glad you didn't really get angry?

It's more like I'm relieved
than anything else…

I'm sorry.
From now on, I'll be nicer, okay?
Why are you talking down to me!?
Hmph!
Ugh…

(Ushio, in her own way,
was also worried…)

(If that's the case,
I should have been more careful…)
(No, in the end we still fought…)
